description: Context attached to clickout events — when a user clicks through to a streaming provider to watch, rent, or buy content. Present on se_category='clickout' events only.

providerId.description: Streaming provider ID. Join to packages table: cc_clickout:providerId::NUMBER = packages.id. Always present.

provider.description: Provider display name (e.g. "Netflix", "Amazon Prime Video"). Same value as se_label on clickout events.

monetizationType.description: How the content is monetised. Values: "flatrate" (subscription), "free" (ad-supported), "rent", "buy", "cinema", "ads", "sports".

clickoutType.description: Type of clickout offer. Values: "regular", "promoted", "free_trial", "qtv". ~96% fill rate.

placement.description: Where on the page the clickout was shown. Values: "banner_buybox", "promoted_buybox", "backdrop", "search_page", etc. ~97% fill rate.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 country code for this offer (e.g. "DE", "GB"). ~52% fill rate.

filterOption.description: Active filter tab in the offers section (e.g. "stream", "rent", "buy"). ~68% fill rate.

rowNumber.description: Row position of this offer in the offers section (0-based). ~78% fill rate.

noOffer.description: True if the title page had no active streaming offer. ~72% fill rate.
